calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-15-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Marina R. Franco, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Sutter House Apartments.
Karla Rossi, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Chris Quitoriano.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 2, 2010.
Default was entered against defendant Rosario Quitoriano on March 1, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Sutter House Apartments, and against defendants Rosario Quitoriano, an individual, and Chris Quitoriano, an individual, as follows:

Judgment for Possession as to the premises located at 1140 Sutter Street, #310, San Francisco, CA 94109. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-15-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by defendant

The trial date of MAR-15-2010 remains on calendar.
